overall.description: A cyberpunk-themed game scene featuring a character with pink hair and yellow pants leaning against a vibrantly graffitied teal wall in a sunlit urban wasteland. The camera performs a continuous orbital pan around the stationary character as they smoke and eat, with occasional NPC pedestrians passing by in the background.

agents.ego_description: leaning against the graffiti wall, smoking a cigarette then transitioning to eating a burger while the camera orbits

derelict cars parked along the dusty street

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits around a character leaning against a vibrant teal graffiti wall in a sunlit cyberpunk wasteland. The character smokes then begins eating as the camera moves from the left side toward the front. A male NPC in a tank top walks past in the background around the 17-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk urban street with distant abandoned vehicles

events.description: NPC in red jacket walks past behind the character from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing to eat the burger while leaning against the wall, occasionally looking around

notable_agents.action: person wearing red jacket and light-colored pants walking past from right to left

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its orbital path around the character, now showing the right side and back angles. The character continues eating while leaning against the graffiti wall. Another pedestrian in a red jacket walks by in the background as the camera completes its orbit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous orbital camera movement around a stationary character, shifting from a profile view to a full wrap-around perspective within a sunlit cyberpunk wasteland. It begins by gliding from the left side toward the front of the character, who leans against a vibrant teal graffiti wall while smoking and starting to eat. As the camera maintains its steady arc, a male NPC in a tank top crosses the background, adding a sense of life to the urban decay. The movement then continues seamlessly to reveal the character's right side and back, while another pedestrian in a red jacket passes by in the distance. The scene finally concludes as the camera completes its full rotation, keeping the character centered against the colorful wall.
